caption: A man wearing a dark, short-sleeved shirt is positioned inside the curling tube of a large, blue-toned ocean wave. He appears to be surfing or swimming through the water as white foam and spray crash around him. Superimposed on the scene is white text that reads "the Tiger Technicians Hour with Basil Chapman 1 877-927-6648". A "Tiger TV" logo is visible in the upper right corner. As the scene progresses, the camera angle shifts and the water continues to churn, partially obscuring the man and the text. By the final moments, the superimposed text becomes mirrored and distorted, appearing upside down and reversed as it blends into the white water of the wave. The lighting is cool and atmospheric, emphasizing the deep blue and turquoise hues of the water.
